context_note: Most recent quarters reported around PANW Q2 FY26 (Feb 13, 2025). Used for peer comparison in demo.

CRWD.peer_read: ARR .24B (+23%) — PANW NGS ARR .8B (+37%) ahead. CRWD recovering from July 2024 outage. ARR growth decelerated from pre-outage pace. Platform play is Falcon platform consolidation vs. PANW platformization strategy.

FTNT.peer_read: Revenue +17% with RECORD non-GAAP operating margin 39.2%. Most profitable of the peer set. Hardware/appliance mix different from PANW — less SaaS-heavy, more product. Unified SASE and SecOps ARR growing well. Reported one week before PANW.

ZS.peer_read: Revenue +23% — fastest grower in peer set. Zero Trust and AI platform positioning. Billings growth +18% trails revenue growth (slightly), watch for deceleration signal. Not yet GAAP profitable but strong non-GAAP trajectory. Reported 3 weeks after PANW.

arr_comparison.note: PANW NGS ARR growing faster than CRWD total ARR — platformization accelerating

margin_comparison.note: FTNT most efficient, PANW margin flat YoY — platform investments not yet showing leverage

competitive_snapshot.analytical_implication: PANW trading on NGS ARR narrative (5B 2030 goal), not current revenue growth. The question is whether platformization compounds faster than the multiple implies — the alpha edge question in Move 1.
